caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "ICON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. To his right, a white mannequin torso is visible. Small logos appear in the lower corners of the scene, including one that says "REALLY TOT." Across the sequence, the man shifts his facial expression and head position. He begins by looking slightly upward and to the side with a neutral gaze, then opens his mouth as if speaking, then winces and squints his eyes while tilting his head, and finally settles into a slight pout with a thoughtful expression. The background setting remains static while the man's movements are focused on his facial reactions and slight shifts in posture.
